booking.requested: New booking request from {{passengerName}} for your {{commuteType}} commute on {{date}}.
booking.accepted: {{driverName}} accepted your booking for the {{commuteType}} commute on {{date}}.
booking.refused: {{driverName}} declined your booking for the {{commuteType}} commute on {{date}}.
booking.canceled: {{passengerName}} canceled their booking on your {{commuteType}} commute on {{date}}.
